base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of whip_cycle_palette_example — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. 'CHAIN AND M.STAR CYCLE SPRITE WHIP PALETTE' — 4-frame color-cycle flash of whip-tip. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 'CHAIN AND M.STAR CYCLE SPRITE WHIP PALETTE' — 4-frame color-cycle flash of whip-tip; cycles during strike. Same metallic-glint trick as CV1
